description:
SUBSCRIBE TO WATCH THE VIDEOS FIRST 
https://www.youtube.com/@govclose/?sub_confirmation=1

GET CERTIFIED: Earn up to $400K a year as a freelance GOVERNMENT CONTRACT CONSULTANT:
https://www.govclose.com/sales-certification

$997 SCHEDULE A BUSINESS GROWTH COACHING SESSION WITH Lt Col (Ret) Howard 
https://www.dodcontract.com/offers/icoUFuC2/checkout

Order Today "The Government Contract Planner"
https://a.co/d/7HCQFHy

WATCH NEXT:

The GovClose Certification
https://youtu.be/S2UwMq6933Y

How To Write Proposals:
https://youtu.be/5GoJFzFrsSk

2024 Sam.gov Registration
https://youtu.be/ahOJCDV4Q-E?si=e_fZxBuIrwkQaOtQ

Follow me on Linkedin:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/rickychoward/

In this video, Ricky Howard, a former government procurement officer, shares critical insights on how to approach government contracting. Ricky guides viewers through the three key questions they need to ask during meetings with government officials to determine if they have a legitimate opportunity to win a contract. He emphasizes the importance of engaging with the government before solicitations are published and understanding the funding, timeline, and contract methodology. Additionally, the video offers tips on managing expectations and potential strategies if your business lacks required qualifications. Ricky also promotes govclose.com for further training and consultancy support.
